Interface IRenderer

All Known Implementing Classes:
TerminalRenderer
public interface IRenderer
Contract for rendering game state to the screen. GameEngine depends on this interface rather than calling UIManager static methods directly, so the view layer can change independently.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    clear()
    Clears the terminal screen.
    void
    printHint()
    Prints a randomly selected gameplay hint.
    void
    renderActions(Sim activePlayer, List<Interactable> items, boolean isResidential)
    Renders the grid of available actions (interactables + system commands).
    void
    renderActiveSimStats(Sim activePlayer, List<Sim> neighborhood)
    Renders detailed stats for the currently controlled Sim right above the action menu
    void
    renderDeathStats(Sim deadSim)
    Renders the memorial statistics block when a Sim dies.
    void
    renderHouseholdDashboard(List<Sim> neighborhood, Sim activePlayer)
    Renders a compact dashboard of other alive Sims in the neighborhood
    void
    renderHUD(Sim player, Building location, int day, String formattedTime, String timeOfDay, boolean inRoom, String roomName)
    Renders the main HUD showing day, time, location, and the active player's current need values.

  • Method Details

    • clear

      void clear()
      Clears the terminal screen.

    • printHint

      void printHint()
      Prints a randomly selected gameplay hint.

    • renderHUD

      void renderHUD(Sim player, Building location, int day, String formattedTime, String timeOfDay, boolean inRoom, String roomName)
      Renders the main HUD showing day, time, location, and the active player's current need values.

    • renderHouseholdDashboard

      void renderHouseholdDashboard(List<Sim> neighborhood, Sim activePlayer)
      Renders a compact dashboard of other alive Sims in the neighborhood

    • renderActiveSimStats

      void renderActiveSimStats(Sim activePlayer, List<Sim> neighborhood)
      Renders detailed stats for the currently controlled Sim right above the action menu

    • renderDeathStats

      void renderDeathStats(Sim deadSim)
      Renders the memorial statistics block when a Sim dies.

    • renderActions

      void renderActions(Sim activePlayer, List<Interactable> items, boolean isResidential)
      Renders the grid of available actions (interactables + system commands).
      Parameters:
      activePlayer - the currently controlled Sim
      items - interactable objects at the current location
      isResidential - whether house-specific commands should be shown
